flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Avila University rose 93% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.7k → $42.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Avila University rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.3k → $20.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Avila University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (42.6% vs 49.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Avila University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
